watchfiles
==========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which watchfiles installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using watchfiles, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load watchfiles/1.1.1-GCCcore-15.2.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
